shadow.$description: Tiers 1-2 were strengthened (blur/offset/opacity all up) versus their original values per docs/design-research/elevation-surface-case-study.md: light-theme cards now carry elevation via shadow alone (no background tint, see tokens/core/surface-alpha.json and card.css), and the original tier-1/2 values were tuned assuming a tint would share the visual load — shadow-only at the old values read as a flat grey box against the 1px card border. Tiers 3-5 got a small monotonic nudge to keep the progression ordered, not a substantive re-tune.
